title: Radiant Library
description: Adds additional potion effects for developers to use for their mods
body:
Adds additional potion effects for developers to use for their mods

 

ModEffects;
 

Null Curse

Bounce

-Bounce of the ground

Gravity

Snared

-Slow your movement to a crawl

Ghost

-Quick Spectator Mode

Recovery

SelfExplode

-Will Explode

Freezing

-Freeze yourself in place

Defense

-Bolster your Armor

 

And more to come
